name: cdp_notifier

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ status: $('📣 Formatar mensagem final').first().json.skipped_no_target ? 'skipped_no_target' : 'sent', final_channel: $('📣 Formatar mensagem final').first().json.reply_channel }) }}

nodes.name: 🔧 Expandir NOTIFICADO
nodes.notes: Collapse row_numbers for NOTIFICADO; read+remap preserves sheet lineage.

nodes.name: ✅ Marcar NOTIFICADO → CDP_SKUs
nodes.notes: Aggregate delivery: mark NOTIFICADO on cdp_skus after final Telegram/email. Requires canonical headers PROCESSADO/ENCONTRADO/NOTIFICADO (no emoji in row 1).

nodes.name: 📄 Ler CDP_SKUs (NOTIFICADO)
nodes.notes: Read SKUs rows so NOTIFICADO updates match by row_number.

nodes.name: 🧭 Mapear NOTIFICADO por row
nodes.notes: Merge NOTIFICADO onto sheet rows; preserve pairedItem for update.

nodes.name: 🗂️ Gerar CSV final
nodes.notes: Aggregate final email: job-scoped UTF-8 CSV (opens in Excel).

description: CDP notifier: single final message after dual pipeline
